title: dactylorhiza × braunii
intro: Dactylorhiza × braunii, also known as the Braun's orchid, is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Dactylorhiza sambucina and Dactylorhiza maculata. The plant is rich in flavonoids, glycosides, and other bioactive compounds, which are known for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × braunii include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and expectorant properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, coughs, and other respiratory problems. Dactylorhiza × braunii can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine in combination with other plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
